executives.name: Janet Davidson
executives.background: Janet Davidson has been a member of the Supervisory Board since 2013. She was previously President of Alcatel-Lucent’s Quality & Customer Care and held various executive positions at Lucent Technologies and Bell Laboratories.

executives.name: Jeffrey Ubben
executives.background: Founder and Managing Partner of Inclusive Capital Partners, L.P.

executives.name: Kristina Johnson
executives.background: Former President of The Ohio State University. Former Chancellor of the State University of New York.

executives.name: Victoria Harker
executives.background: Victoria D. Harker served as Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer of TEGNA Inc. and previously as CFO of AES Corporation.
